input.headline: The Weeknd’s ‘After Hours ‘Til Dawn’ Tour grosses over $1 billion, Live Nation says

raw.headline: The Weeknd’s ‘After Hours ‘Til Dawn’ Tour grosses over $1 billion, Live Nation says

winner: The Weeknd’s "After Hours 'Til Dawn" tour was so successful that Live Nation considered charging fans for the darkness.

candidates.text: The Weeknd's tour made a billion dollars — guess that means his after-hours habit finally paid off.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'after hours' and 'paid off' are clever and specific to the headline, with concise and surprising humor."}

candidates.text: The Weeknd's tour made a billion dollars — turns out, "After Hours 'Til Dawn" wasn't just a title, it was a full-time job.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 9.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and ties directly to the headline with a clever play on the tour's title."}

candidates.text: I was just trying to make After Hours feel less expensive with a budget tour, and The Weeknd made me realize I need to go to bed early if I want to save $1 billion.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on 'After Hours' and budgeting, but it's a bit forced and lacks punch. The surprise element is weak, and the connection to the headline isn't tight enough."}

candidates.text: The Weeknd’s tour made so much money, Live Nation had to hire a new employee just to count the dollars—his name is "Bill," and he's already got a raise.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with 'Bill' as the new employee, specific reference to Live Nation, concise and natural humor."}

candidates.text: The Weeknd made over a billion dollars on his tour, which is impressive considering he spent most of the show pretending he was having a very bad time.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the tour's success with a specific reference to The Weeknd's performance style, concise and naturally funny."}

candidates.text: The Weeknd’s "After Hours 'Til Dawn" tour was so successful that Live Nation considered charging fans for the darkness.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on the tour name and a clever twist with charging for darkness show good surprise and specificity."}

candidates.text: The Weeknd’s tour grossed a billion dollars because he’s the only artist who can make a "After Hours" shift feel like a "Dawn" of fiscal responsibility.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on the album title and tour name with a clever twist on fiscal responsibility, showing specificity and surprise."}

candidates.text: The Weeknd’s tour grossed a billion dollars because he actually stayed awake for a billion consecutive hours until the sun finally gave up and went home.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is creative and ties the tour's success to a humorous exaggeration of the album title, but the explanation feels slightly forced and less impactful due to its length."}

candidates.text: The Weeknd's "After Hours 'Til Dawn" tour is so successful, it's making other artists feel like they're performing in someone else's after hours.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on 'After Hours,' but it's a bit generic and lacks specificity about the $1 billion gross or Live Nation's involvement."}
